title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: An interview hosted by Alex Kantrowitz featuring NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis discussing best practices for building and deploying AI agents in enterprise settings. Topics include safety governance, autonomous agent design, and ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist that has automated 90% of internal support tickets.
